overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a lush meadow alongside a flowing stream during golden hour, approaching and entering a wooden fortification with palisade walls. The warm sunset lighting casts long shadows across the natural landscape and wooden structures.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path next to the stream, exploring the wilderness with swords on his back

entered.detail: clear water stream with visible current and reflections running parallel to the path
grassy area with colorful wildflowers, tall grass, and scattered bushes
dense coniferous trees forming the backdrop against the orange sunset sky
narrow winding dirt trail through the meadow with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path beside a flowing stream through a lush meadow filled with wildflowers. The golden hour sun casts warm orange light across the scene, with a dense pine forest visible in the background.

events.description: terrain becomes rockier and uneven as the stream recedes into the background
wooden palisade wall of the fortification becomes prominently visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rocky path toward the wooden fortification, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: tall defensive wall made of sharpened wooden logs surrounding the settlement
stone foundation structure with wooden support posts near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The path becomes rockier and less vegetated as Geralt approaches a wooden fortification. The stream and meadow fall behind while a tall wooden palisade wall with a stone chimney structure comes into view ahead, bathed in the warm sunset light.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden log ramp entrance into fortified settlement

events.description: beginning to ascend the wooden log ramp leading to the fortification gate
entering the shadow cast by the wooden gate structure, visibility decreases
passing through the wooden gate into the interior of the fortified area

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden log steps of the ramp and passing through the gate into the fortification

entered.detail: large fortified entrance structure made of vertical wooden logs with a narrow passage
steep ramp constructed of horizontal logs leading up to the gate entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a steep ramp made of horizontal logs to reach the wooden gate entrance. As he enters the fortified structure, the lighting shifts dramatically to shadowed darkness. He passes through the narrow wooden gate into the interior, where the path continues beyond the palisade walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched natural meadow into the shadowed interior of a wooden fortification. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path beside a flowing stream, surrounded by wildflowers and a distant pine forest under the warm orange glow of the golden hour. As the terrain becomes rockier and the lush vegetation thins, the camera tracks him toward a tall wooden palisade wall and a stone chimney structure bathed in sunset light. The scene then shifts as Geralt ascends a steep ramp of horizontal logs to reach the gate, before the lighting transforms dramatically from bright gold to deep shadow upon entering the narrow wooden entrance. Finally, the camera follows him through the gate and into the interior of the fortified structure.
